name: Microwave Veggie Rice Bowl
instructions: Microwave the rice according to package directions.
Heat the frozen vegetables and black beans in a microwave-safe bowl.
Scramble or poach the egg in the microwave.
Combine everything and season with soy sauce.

name: No-Cook Hummus Wrap
instructions: Spread hummus over the tortilla.
Add spinach, cucumber, and shredded carrot.
Roll tightly and slice in half.

name: Dorm Chicken Quesadilla
instructions: Place chicken, cheese, and salsa on half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla and heat in a pan or microwave until the cheese melts.
Slice and serve.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Oats
instructions: Mix oats and milk in a bowl.
Microwave until soft.
Top with banana slices, peanut butter, and honey.

name: Gluten-Free Tuna Potato Bowl
instructions: Microwave the potato until tender.
Mix tuna with greek yogurt, chopped green onion, and salt.
Split the potato and spoon the tuna mixture on top.

name: Quick Tofu Noodles
instructions: Cook the noodles according to package directions.
Warm tofu and vegetables.
Stir soy sauce and peanut butter into the noodles, then top with tofu and vegetables.

name: Yogurt Berry Parfait
instructions: Layer yogurt, berries, and granola in a bowl or cup.
Drizzle honey on top.

name: Chickpea Salad Bowl
instructions: Drain and rinse the chickpeas.
Dice the vegetables and add them to a bowl.
Dress with olive oil and lemon juice, then toss.
